title: Migration Advisory Committee: annual report, 2025
body: "The report includes:   analysis of the lifetime fiscal impact of the Family visa Partner route, highlighting its long-term fiscal impact and the employment-driven factors behind it an overview of the Overseas Domestic Worker (ODW) route, including the demographics of ODWs and the key benefits and challenges of the route examination of English language proficiency, including levels amongst migrants in the UK, its variation across groups, and its impact on integration   Other documents include:   the governance report which includes the MAC’s financial accounts data tables spreadsheet to accompany the charts and tables in the annual report a MAC letter to the Home Secretary on the annual report  "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
